PROP-baseauction-inv-017.text: safeTransferFrom must pull exactly assetOutAmount from bidder after asset transfer out.
PROP-baseauction-inv-017.assertion: forall bid: balanceOf(assetOut, contract) increases by exactly assetOutAmount after pull

locations.note: safeTransferFrom(assetOut, msg.sender, address(this), assetOutAmount) is the final step pulling payment
